name: AI / AI-safety / sensemaking / x-risk — 20 episodes with public transcripts
note: Existing public text transcripts (not audio). Ingesting these skips ASR/diarization entirely — the transcripts already carry clean speaker labels. format=html pages are scrape-and-parse; format=pdf (The Great Simplification) needs a PDF text-extraction step.
